title: hieracium umbellatum subsp. eurobalticum
intro: Hieracium umbellatum subsp. eurobalticum, also known as the lesser hawk's beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it beneficial for wound healing and reducing pain and swelling. The plant is also valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to support digestive health and act as an antioxidant. Traditionally, the lesser hawk's beard is prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, from skin irritations to digestive issues.
